summary: FY2024 net revenue was $5,329M vs $5,262M prior year (+1.3% Y/Y), with gross margin 39.2%, operating margin 8.0% (AEO 10-K, thousands USD as reported). This public build is static — run the FastAPI app locally or host the API to enable live AI chat.

backtest.model: Component P&L · α=0.80 · 2Y horizon · FY2020 excluded from training
